ham.subject: Flipkart Order Confirmation - Order ID: FK123456789
ham.body:
Hi,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order (Order ID: FK123456789) has been confirmed.

Order Details:
• Product: Kindle Paperwhite 8GB
• Quantity: 1
• Price: ₹1,999.00

Payment Method: Visa ending in 4242
Shipping Address: 12, Laxmi Nagar, Delhi - 110006

Your order will be dispatched soon. Expected delivery: 3-5 working days.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or contact our customer service.

Thanks for choosing Flipkart.

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent IT Ticket: Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi,

We have detected suspicious activity on your corporate account. An IT ticket has been created (Ticket #IT-987654) and requires your immediate attention.

Please verify your account information by clicking the link below:

<URL>

After verification, your account will be restored and you can continue using the corporate portal.

If you ignore this ticket, your account will be suspended until we receive your verification.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk
